response.original_title: Ngayuku Papa (My Dog): Bluey and Big Boy
response.overview: Ngayuku Papa: Bluey & Big Boy (My Dog: Bluey & Big Boy) is a tale about Maureen Butler-Baker’s two dogs, Bluey and Big Boy. While dogs are great companions in community, they also help in the hunt for traditional foods such as perentie, and introduced species such as rabbits.
response.title: Ngayuku Papa (My Dog): Bluey and Big Boy
